quotes.verbatim_quote:
+9/b9/13/9(6)/11/-+5/b5 may be substituted for
simple Dominants.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Which extended/altered dominants are interchangeable with plain dominants.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
All changes should be reduced to three-
or four-note chords.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Voicing economy: three or four notes only.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
for better movement, voicings
should lead into one another or have a common tone con-
necting them.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Smooth motion or common-tone connection governs chord progressions.
